channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Your horoscope outlook for March 22, 2026
item.description: The horoscope for March 22, 2026, offers insights for each zodiac sign. For Aries, the focus is on imagination, encouraging new ideas with long-term potential. Taurus should trust their instincts, eve...

item.title: Governor Radda Pledges Commitment to Peace and Cultural Preservation at 2026 Katsina Eid-el-Fitr Durbar
item.description: During the colourful 2026 Katsina Eid-el-Fitr Durbar, also known as Hawan Sarki, Governor Dikko Radda of Katsina State used the occasion to reaffirm his administration's dedication to restoring peace ...

item.title: Conspiracy theories and AI make people reject clear evidence of reality
item.description: The article discusses how conspiracy theories, boosted by artificial intelligence tools, have entered mainstream discussions on social media. It focuses on recent videos posted by Israeli Prime Minist...

item.title: Bronze bison statues installed outside Smithsonian museum to mark US 250th anniversary
item.description: Three larger-than-life bronze statues of American bison have been unveiled outside the Smithsonian’s National Museum of Natural History in Washington, D.C. The sculptures, which made their public debu...

item.title: Heavy Rains Displace Thousands and Block Roads Across Kenyan Counties
item.description: Heavy rains have pounded several parts of Kenya, leaving thousands of people displaced and many roads impassable. In counties like Murang’a, Kirinyaga, Nyeri and others, families have lost homes to fl...

item.title: Alex Eala advances to Miami Open fourth round after beating Magda Linette
item.description: Alex Eala of the Philippines has made it to the fourth round of the 2026 Miami Open, following a 6-3, 7-6 win over Poland’s Magda Linette on March 21. The victory marks Eala's second win over Linette ...

item.title: Vihiga Senator Describes Narrow Escape After Plane Skids Off Runway at Wilson Airport
item.description: Vihiga Senator Godfrey Osotsi recounted a terrifying experience when the plane he was on, carrying 34 passengers and five crew members, crash-landed at Wilson Airport on the evening of March 20, 2026....

item.title: US President Trump issues 48-hour ultimatum to Iran to reopen Strait of Hormuz or face strikes on power plants
item.description: US President Donald Trump has issued a strong ultimatum to Iran, threatening to obliterate its major power plants if Tehran does not fully reopen the Strait of Hormuz within 48 hours. This comes as a ...

item.title: Improving Parliamentary Oversight: Calls for More Frequent Presidential Accountability
item.description: This opinion piece by MMUSI MAIMANE argues that South Africa’s parliamentary system currently provides insufficient oversight of the president, undermining democratic accountability. Under rule 140, t...

item.title: Cole Caufield records hat trick and five points in Canadiens' 7-3 win over Islanders
item.description: In a high-scoring National Hockey League matchup on Saturday night in Montreal, the Montreal Canadiens defeated the New York Islanders by a score of 7-3. Cole Caufield was the standout performer, nett...

item.title: Western Sydney man charged following police pursuit and subsequent siege
item.description: A man from Western Sydney has been charged by NSW Police after he allegedly led officers on a high-speed pursuit that concluded with a siege situation. The incident occurred in the lead-up to March 22...

item.title: Dollar to Naira Exchange Rate for March 22nd, 2026 in the Black Market
item.description: As of March 21st, 2026, the dollar to naira exchange rate in the black market (parallel market) in Lagos stands at ₦1410 for selling and ₦1395 for buying. This rate is significantly higher than the Ce...

item.title: President Zardari urges India to fully implement Indus Waters Treaty and stop weaponising shared water
item.description: On World Water Day 2026, President Asif Ali Zardari called on India to immediately restore full implementation of the Indus Waters Treaty (IWT) in line with its international legal obligations. He str...

item.title: Oral PCSK9 Inhibitor Enlicitide Reduces LDL Cholesterol by Approximately 60% in Phase 3 Trial
item.description: A phase 3 clinical trial published in The New England Journal of Medicine demonstrated that enlicitide, an experimental oral PCSK9 inhibitor developed by Merck, significantly lowered low-density lipop...

item.title: Direct Flights Make Perth an Accessible and Unique Destination for South Africans
item.description: Perth, Western Australia’s western capital, has become much more accessible to South African travellers with the introduction of a direct flight from Johannesburg. The nine-hour journey opens up a sid...

item.title: Clash breaks out between BJP and TMC supporters in West Bengal; Rahul Gandhi to launch Kerala poll campaign
item.description: In the latest election developments across India, clashes erupted between supporters of the BJP and the TMC in West Bengal, leading to a strong security presence to control the situation. Meanwhile, t...

item.title: Exploring Vulnerability and Independence in Shunali Khullar Shroff’s ‘The Wrong Way Home’
item.description: Shunali Khullar Shroff’s novel The Wrong Way Home centres on Nayantara (Nayan), a forty-year-old divorced woman navigating emotional uncertainty and professional instability in modern Mumbai. Despite ...

item.title: Nonprofits and airport communities provide food aid to unpaid TSA officers during partial DHS shutdown
item.description: Across the United States, nonprofits, unions, and airport communities are stepping in to support Transportation Security Administration (TSA) officers who have been working without full pay for over a...

item.title: Ottawa Senators defeat Toronto Maple Leafs 5-2 with early dominance
item.description: The Ottawa Senators delivered a strong performance against their provincial rivals, the Toronto Maple Leafs, securing a 5-2 victory on Saturday night. The Senators established control early, scoring t...

item.title: Kiambu Couple Strengthens Marriage by Working Together in Transport SACCO
item.description: In Kiambu county, Jane and Peter, a devoted Akorino couple, are showing Kenyans how couples can thrive by working together. Married for over 13 years, they both operate in the same matatu SACCO, with ...
